title: Monachochlamys floribunda
taxonomy: Monachochlamys floribunda is classified within the family Gesneriaceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet or Gesneriad family. This family comprises a large and diverse group of plants, including both annuals and perennials, which are native to various parts of the world. Monachochlamys floribunda is also classified within the genus Monachochlamys, which is a small genus of flowering plants that are native to Africa. The specific classification of Monachochlamys floribunda places it within the order Lamiales, a large and diverse order of flowering plants. The classification of Monachochlamys floribunda provides insight into its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.
